items.title: Amazon (AMZN) Beats Stock Market Upswing: What Investors Need to Know
items.description: In the latest trading session, Amazon (AMZN) closed at $231.43, marking a +1.44% move from the previous day.

items.title: Amazon Expects Kuiper to Serve Five Countries by Early 2026
items.description: Ricky Freeman, president of government solutions for the Project Kuiper satellite venture, said Amazon expected to have more than 200 satellites in low-Earth orbit by the end of the year.  Amazon aims to build out a fleet of more than 3,200 satellites, which will offer connectivity to individual customers, businesses and governments.

items.title: With no DOJ breakup, Alphabet becomes a $3 trillion company
items.description: Investors continue to reward Alphabet's stock after a judge declined to break up Google earlier this month.

items.title: OpenAI Chair Calls AI A Bubble With Real Staying Power
items.description: OpenAI chair likens moment to dot-com boom that birthed giants

items.title: Stocks Rally as Bond Yields Fall Before FOMC Meeting
items.description: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) on Monday closed up +0.47%, the Dow Jones Industrials Index ($DOWI ) (DIA ) closed up +0.11%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) closed up +0.84%. September E-mini S&P futures (ESU25 ) rose +0.43%, and September E-mini Nasdaq futures...
